model.name: rollback
model.title: Rollback
model.description: Forces a rollback by stopping routing the message
model.label: eip,routing

id.description: Sets the id of this node

note.description: Sets the note of this node

description.description: Sets the description of this node

disabled.label: advanced
disabled.description: Whether to disable this EIP from the route during build time. Once an EIP has been disabled then it cannot be enabled later at runtime.

message.description: The message to set on the exception when rolling back.

markRollbackOnly.description: If enabled then only the current transaction is marked for rollback. No exception is thrown and the route continues to execute.

markRollbackOnlyLast.label: advanced
markRollbackOnlyLast.description: If enabled then only the last sub-transaction (from the last transacted EIP) is marked for rollback. This allows partial rollbacks in nested transaction scenarios.
